final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with a single bit input (D), a read enable (RE), a write enable (WE), and a clock (CLK). The output (Q) should be updated on the falling edge of CLK when WE is high, and it should reflect the stored value on the falling edge of CLK when RE is high.
module dram_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    reg stored_bit;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            stored_bit <= D; // Write operation
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= stored_bit; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule

The output (Q) should be updated on the falling edge of CLK when WE is high, and it should reflect the stored value on the falling edge of CLK when RE is high.
